title: Community Board
tagline: Your central hub for server features — press Alt+B in-game to open it.
intro: The Community Board is a custom in-game panel that gives access to all of Kairos's extended features from one place. Open it at any time by pressing Alt+B. The left-hand menu lists every available section — click any entry to navigate to it.

cards.title: Server Tools
cards.desc: Utility tools — premium status, offline trade, and more.

cards.title: Faction War
cards.desc: Join a faction and compete in ongoing PvP conflicts.

cards.title: Buffer
cards.desc: Save and apply personal buff schemes. Level up with L-Coin.

cards.title: Tarot Cards
cards.desc: Open card packs from bosses for Doll pieces, Relic pieces, and enchants.

cards.title: Noblesse
cards.desc: Unlock Noblesse status to enable SP conversion for Rebirth.

cards.title: Rebirth
cards.desc: Reset your character for permanent rebirth skill points.

cards.title: Raid Teleport
cards.desc: Instantly teleport to raid boss locations.

cards.title: Collection
cards.desc: Complete item sets for permanent passive stat boosts.

cards.title: Alchemy
cards.desc: Combine materials into powerful consumables.

cards.title: Champion Hard
cards.desc: Choose your difficulty — higher champion tier, harder mobs, better rewards.

cards.title: MultiSkill
cards.desc: Learn skills from any retail class or unlock exclusive custom passives.

cards.title: Tatto Master
cards.desc: Register tattoo passives using zone materials for permanent stat boosts.

cards.title: Player Difficulty
cards.desc: Adjust personal difficulty settings for extra challenge and rewards.

cards.title: Guardians
cards.desc: Powerful guardian companions that assist in combat.

cards.title: Dolls
cards.desc: Collectible dolls built from Normal Tarot card pieces granting passive bonuses.

cards.title: Relics
cards.desc: Powerful relics built from Hard Tarot card pieces.

cards.title: Compound
cards.desc: Combine items and materials into enhanced equipment.

cards.title: Pets
cards.desc: Tame and level pets that provide buffs and assistance.

cards.title: Skinning
cards.desc: Customise your character's appearance with skins.

cards.title: Torment
cards.desc: A challenging endgame system with unique rewards.
